title: New Milestone Reached: Waga Energy Signs Two Contracts in California
content: Waga Energy and G2 Energy have joined forces to develop two RNG (Renewable Natural Gas) production projects in the United States. These projects will be based on landfills operated by Recology in California.These are the first two contracts signed by Waga Energy in the West coast of the US, and are in line with our development strategy in the North American market. These RNG production units bring to 11 the number of projects currently under construction in the United States, in addition to two units already in operation.
author: Analysts Account
